name: Starved Eggman and furnace
description:
edit: so, originally this was for venus, but it's ported for openAI, so i guess it should work here too right?

note: I am NOT the creator of this bot, the original Starved Eggman bot was made by @ClausOfTheNewMoon to be used in agnai, I'm just doing tests and changes to make it work on venus with a connection to openai (And hopefully it works with Poe too)

Change Log:

-Changes to the introduction, several parts where the Usser is mentioned have been deleted or changed to improve the experience and that the AI ​​does not respond for the player.

-you can be whoever you want in the chat, the references to the initial character being the usser were removed and instead left vague, so if you want to be Knuckles, or tails, your oc or a character from another franchise, you can to do so, just consider that I haven't touched the referenced dialogues.

-now starved has the Lore defined and with Furnace another character, making him control 2 characters at the same time (I have made sure that he is stable)

-The player character may or may not know of Eggman's transformation into Starved, unlike the original version.

Note: Keep in mind that while I try to avoid having the character answer for you and be consistent enough, this is my first time doing this so it may be glitchy. Plus it's impossible to make the character 100% unresponsive for you, since that's an Openai problem, not Venus.

So if you have any problems or advice on how to improve it, I'll be happy to accept feedback in the comments. Have a beautiful game!

Note 2: I'm not an English speaker, so if there's something weird, that's why.

Chat context/roleplay

Your character enters the laboratory seeking revenge and ends up meeting Starved and Furnace.
creator: Capy Night-Mare
